meta.title: Community | Essentia Tenerife
meta.description: Join the Essentia community — running club, longevity education programs, member events, and exclusive memberships in Tenerife.

hero.headline: Health is better together.
hero.title: Where longevity
hero.body: A private club where shared purpose builds real connection. Run, learn, and grow alongside people who take their health seriously.

runningClub.title: Running Club
runningClub.description: Weekly coastal routes through Costa Adeje. All levels welcome.

education.title: Education Programs
education.description: Monthly masterclasses with researchers and longevity practitioners.

values.heading: Why community
values.body: Essentia is more than a place to train and recover. It is a network of people who understand that living well is both a personal discipline and a shared practice.

intention.title: Shared intention
intention.description: Every member is here for the same reason: to live better, longer. That shared purpose makes the community unlike any other.

connection.title: Real connection
connection.description: From early morning runs to member dinners, the relationships built here extend well beyond the club.

growth.title: Collective growth
growth.description: Knowledge shared in our programmes and gatherings compounds across the whole community.

cta.heading: Ready to join?
cta.body: Community access is included with every Essentia membership. Choose your tier and become part of something that lasts.

runningClub.heading: Running Club.
runningClub.body: Curated routes through Costa Adeje, all fitness levels welcome. More than a run — it is the weekly ritual that anchors the Essentia community.

meta.title: Running Club | Essentia Community
meta.description: Join Essentia's running club in Tenerife. Every Saturday at 7:30 am — curated coastal routes, paced groups, and shared breakfast.

hero.title: Running Club.
hero.body: Every Saturday morning we run together through some of the most dramatic coastline in the Canary Islands. No race, no ego, just movement and good company.
hero.imageAlt: Essentia Running Club — coastal route in Costa Adeje

next.heading: Next run.
next.subheading: Show up, run, share breakfast. Every Saturday without exception.
next.comingSoonBody: Details for the next run will be announced soon.

expect.heading: What to expect.
expect.body: The Saturday run is open to all Essentia members. No sign-up needed: just show up at 7:30, ready to move.

routes.title: Curated routes
routes.description: Each week a different route through Costa Adeje: coastal paths, volcanic trails, and clifftop roads with Atlantic views.

paced.title: Paced groups
paced.description: We split into pace groups so no one is left behind. Whether you run 5 min/km or 7, there is a group for you.

community.title: Community first
community.description: The run ends with a shared breakfast. The best conversations happen after the last kilometre.

ctaBlock.heading: See you Saturday.
ctaBlock.body: Running Club access is included with every Essentia membership. Choose your tier and join the community.

meta.title: Register for the Run | Essentia Running Club
meta.description: Register for the next Essentia Running Club session in Costa Adeje, Tenerife.

success.title: You're registered.

education.heading: Education & Programs.
education.subheading: Knowledge that changes how you live.
education.body: Monthly masterclasses, workshops, and immersive programs with leading researchers, clinicians, and practitioners. All members are welcome.

meta.title: Education Programs | Essentia Community
meta.description: Monthly masterclasses with leading researchers, clinicians, and practitioners. Science you can use, delivered in person.

hero.title: Education
hero.body: Monthly masterclasses with leading researchers, clinicians, and practitioners. Science you can use, delivered in person.

next.heading: Next session.
next.subheading: One evening a month. One topic that changes how you think about your health.
next.comingSoonBody: Details for the next session will be announced soon.
next.noSessions: There are no sessions scheduled at the moment.
next.membersOnlyNote: This session is available to Essentia members only.

format.heading: How it works.
format.body: Each programme runs one evening per month at the Essentia club. Seats are limited and reserved for members.

experts.title: Expert speakers
experts.description: Each session features a researcher, clinician, or practitioner at the frontier of longevity science.

practical.title: Practical takeaways
practical.description: Every talk closes with a set of protocols or habits you can apply the following week.

dialogue.title: Open dialogue
dialogue.description: The second hour is reserved for Q&A and discussion. Bring your questions.

ctaBlock.heading: Knowledge is the longest-lasting protocol.
ctaBlock.body: Education Programs are included with every Essentia membership. Choose your tier and reserve your seat.

events.heading: Member Events.
events.body: Private dinners, wellness retreats, and seasonal celebrations — moments that make the club feel like a second home.
